Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonCourseBase

Represents base course's information.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CourseId

The unique id for the course, in scope of a site (itslearning customer).

 integer

None.
Title

The course title.

 string

None.
FriendlyName

The course friendly name.

 string

None.
CourseColor

Color code for the course.

 string

None.
CourseFillColor

Fill color code for the course.

 string

None.
CourseCode

Code for the course.

 string

None.
